heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 152306 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation has the exclusive right to use the name “National Music Council” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15230636:676., .Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 824, § 1670 Stat. 797The words “sole” and “as representing such Corporation” are omitted as unnecessary.
